好心你咪成日以己度人啦:
自己裝到用到 = 人地都一定裝到用到 => 要裝自己裝到用到果隻!
自己裝完用唔到 = 人地都一定裝完用唔到 => 都係要人地裝自己裝到用到果隻!

你同Mr.A一樣, 都係犯咗呢個logic通病, 太過opininated, 唉!

(P.S. 個個Linux Distro都有自己既community, 大家又有Stack Overflow做參考, 起碼都應該睇下眾人既意見先落conclusion啦! 發覺power_off你好多時都只以自己為standard, 咁同林鄭之流有何分別呢?! )

Sorry, 係我多事!

BTW, 啱啱清潔緊電腦枱時, 係櫃桶底摷到篇咁既野, 似乎幾啱囉嚟形連/高登仔覆人post時常用既技倆!

FALLACIOUS(謬誤的) ARGUMENT

A fallacious argument is either deliberate(專登) or inadvertent(唔小心). In either case, it is an error that invalidates an argument. You should take care to understand the logical methods of persuasion, lest(以免) you fall into "logical fallacy(邏輯謬誤)", either as a writer or as a reader. Logical fallacy may use one or more of the following techniques:

Red Herring begging the question(以假定作為論據進行討論; 迴避問題既實質), ignoring the context of the argument, or bring in a false issue

Argumentum ad Hominem attacking the man rather than the issue

Hasty Generalization jumping to a conclusion without evidence

Black-White or Either-Or Fallacy stereotyping(對某人/事有一成不變既睇法), drawing faulty or inadequate causal relations, or considering only two alternatives(非黑即白也) when others may be available.

False Analogy forming comparisons between two or more things that should not be logically compared.

唔知大家多數採用/誤墮邊個方法嚟覆post呢?!
